title: Oracle WebLogic Server Configuration Structure
description: Structure documentation for Oracle WebLogic Server configuration as returned by the RESTful Management Services API.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Unique name of the managed server within the domain

fields.name: listenAddress
fields.description: IP address or DNS name on which the server listens for requests

fields.name: listenPort
fields.description: Port number on which the server listens for non-SSL requests (default: 7001)

fields.name: cluster
fields.description: Name of the cluster this server belongs to

fields.name: machine
fields.description: Name of the machine (host) this server is configured to run on

fields.name: serverStartState
fields.description: Desired startup state: RUNNING, STANDBY, ADMIN

fields.name: autoRestart
fields.description: Whether Node Manager should restart this server if it fails

fields.name: jvmArgs
fields.description: JVM arguments passed to the server's Java process

fields.name: javaHome
fields.description: Path to the Java home directory used by this server

fields.name: classpath
fields.description: Additional classpath entries for the server

fields.name: tunnelingEnabled
fields.description: Whether HTTP tunneling is enabled for T3 protocol

fields.name: weblogicPluginEnabled
fields.description: Whether the WebLogic proxy plugin is enabled

fields.name: defaultInternalServletsDisabled
fields.description: Whether internal servlets are disabled on this server
